TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) — derived 

FILE(S): Part D Beneficiary Auto-Assignment file 

VALUES: Y = Yes, beneficiary was reassigned to the Part D Plan at the beginning of the year 
Null/missing = Beneficiary was not reassigned in January of the reference year
